plurals.name: recently_deleted_remind_des_days
plurals.item: This password will be permanently deleted in %d day. Restore it in time if you need it.
This password will be permanently deleted in %d days. Restore it in time if you need it.

plurals.name: recently_deleted_remind_des_hours
plurals.item: This password will be permanently deleted in %d hour. Restore it in time if you need it.
This password will be permanently deleted in %d hours. Restore it in time if you need it.

plurals.name: settings_clear_data_confirmation
plurals.item: "If you delete passwords now, you'll have to enter them manually next time you sign in. Delete the password for %1$s selected app?"
"If you delete passwords now, you'll have to enter them manually next time you sign in. Delete the passwords for %1$s selected apps?"
